title: Canadian Baptist Theological Seminary and College - Canada.ca
content:
## Canadian Baptist Theological Seminary and College
You’re eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Christian Ministry
- Bachelor of Christian Studies
- Master of Biblical Studies
- Master of Christian Ministry
- Master of Christian Studies
You’re not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
